name: Coconut Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the grated coconut in a saucepan and add the sugar and milk. Bring to a boil and cook about 5 minutes. Let cool.
2. Strain the liquid through cheesecloth, squeezing out as much coconut meat as possible. Reserve 2 cups of the grated meat; discard the rest or use it elsewhere.
3. Put the egg yolks in a mixing bowl and beat with a whisk. Gradually add the sweetened liquid and pour into a saucepan. Stir constantly, ensuring the spoon touches all parts of the pan's bottom. Cook until the mixture reaches custard consistency and coats the sides of the spoon (180°F). Do not boil; it will curdle.
4. Remove from heat and stir. Place in a basin of cold water to cool to room temperature.
5. Pour into an electric or hand-cranked ice cream maker's container. Freeze according to manufacturer instructions, adding the reserved coconut pulp and continuing until solid.
